# Slideshow Modes

**API Collection**

The kind of items in the slideshow.

## Constants

- **IKSlideshowModeImages**: All items in the slideshow are images.
- **IKSlideshowModePDF**: All items in the slideshow are PDF documents.
- **IKSlideshowModeOther**: There are a mixture of items in the slideshow (image, PDF, text, HTML, and so on).

## Constants

- **Bundle Identifiers**: Identifiers for exporting slideshow items to an application.
- **Slideshow Option Keys**: Keys for slideshow options.
